sourcesContent:
import '../styles/hero.css' const DATA = { greeting: 'Available for Internships & Opportunities', name: 'Harshini Devi Nakka', roleEmphasis: 'Python & IoT', description: `Aspiring Computer Science & Engineering student specialising in IoT, with hands-on experience in Python, real-time systems, and automation. Currently expanding into full-stack web development.`, stats: [ { number: '2+', label: 'Projects Built' }, { number: '3+', label: 'Certifications' }, { number: '7.76', label: 'CGPA' }, { number: '88.7%', label: 'Class XII Score' }, ], socials: [ { label: 'GitHub', href: 'https://github.com/harshinidevinakka', svg: ( ), }, { label: 'LinkedIn', href: 'https://linkedin.com/in/harshinidevinakka', svg: ( ), }, ], } const ArrowIcon = () => ( ) const UserIcon = () => ( ) const Hero = () => (
{DATA.greeting}

Hi, I'm {DATA.name}

I work with {DATA.roleEmphasis} & Web Dev

{DATA.description}

View Projects Get In Touch
Find me on
{DATA.socials.map(s => ( {s.svg} ))}
🎓 CSE — IoT
⚡ Open to Internships
{DATA.stats.map(s => (
{s.number} {s.label}
))}
) export default Hero
